title: 2026-04-01｜AI 新聞熱點
text: 2026-04-01 AI Today in 5: April 1, 2026, The AI Down Under Edition | Thomas Fox Apple celebrates 50 years as AI rivals surge ahead Key nonprofit pitches tech giants to pay $100M each for AI safety effort Data centers emerge as targets in warfare's AI era AI database deep dive: Oracle's platform redesign Will AI Replace My Job In The Next 12 Months? The IT department: Where AI goes to die New CIS Report Warns Prompt Injection Attacks Pose Growing Risk AI Today 5：2026 年 4 月 1 日，AI Down Under Edition |托馬斯福克斯 蘋果慶祝成立 50 週年，AI 競爭對手遙遙領先 主要非營利組織呼籲科技巨頭每家支付 1 億美元用於人工智慧安全工作 資料中心成為戰爭人工智慧時代的目標 AI資料庫深入探討：Oracle的平台重新設計 Will AI Replace My Job In The Next 12 Months? The IT department: Where AI goes to die 新的 CIS 報告警告即時注入攻擊的風險越來越大 Jump to: Latest Updates ». Find Author # Apple celebrates 50 years as AI rivals surge ahead. "The company made it fifty years with no one truly competing with its integrated business model; the fate of its next fifty… California-based nonprofit Common Sense Media is asking top AI firms to help fund new safety assessments — and it's offering companies input Data centers emerge as targets in warfare's AI era · They represent billions of dollars of investment both foreign and domestic, today and AI database innovation at Oracle drives a redesigned data platform with vector search, AI agents, stronger privacy controls and quantum-safe * CMO Unscripted: Vulnerability Is The New Superpower For Leaders In The AI Era. * Corrections%20%0A%20Author:%20Luis%20Ibarra%20%0A%20URL:%20 Companies are racing to de-weird AI, and in doing so they are squandering what makes it transformative, turning it into just the latest wave of This report makes clear that technical prompt injections aren't a theoretical problem, they're a real and immediate risk.” 跳轉至：最新更新»。尋找作者 # Apple 慶祝成立 50 週年，AI 競爭對手一路高歌猛進。 「該公司成立了五十年，沒有人真正與其綜合業務模式競爭；下一個五十年的命運 總部位於加州的非營利組織 Common Sense Media 正在要求頂級人工智慧公司幫助資助新的安全評估，並為公司提供意見 資料中心成為戰爭人工智慧時代的目標 · 它們代表國內外數十億美元的投資，無論是現在還是將來 Oracle 的人工智慧資料庫創新推動了重新設計的資料平台，包括向量搜尋、人工智慧代理、更強大的隱私控制和量子安全 * CMO Unscripted: Vulnerability Is The New Superpower For Leaders In The AI Era. * Corrections%20%0A%20Author:%20Luis%20Ibarra%20%0A%20URL:%20 公司正在競相消除人工智慧的怪異，但在這樣做的過程中，他們正在浪費人工智慧的變革性力量，將其變成最新一波人工智慧浪潮。 這份報告明確指出，技術即時注射不是理論上的問題，而是真實且直接的風險。 」 jdsupra.com usatoday.com politico.com axios.com siliconangle.com forbes.com economist.com blufftontoday.com
